name: @waycraft/waypoint-mcp
description: A structured development protocol as an MCP server. 14 tools that guide any project from goal to ship.

scripts.test: tsx tests/goal.test.ts && tsx tests/research.test.ts && tsx tests/compare.test.ts && tsx tests/plan.test.ts && tsx tests/build.test.ts && tsx tests/test.test.ts && tsx tests/fix.test.ts && tsx tests/debug.test.ts && tsx tests/measure.test.ts && tsx tests/improve.test.ts && tsx tests/document.test.ts && tsx tests/review.test.ts
